name: film-wall
description: 个人影视墙与书架 — 基于 Astro 构建的静态记录网站

scripts.build: npm run data:normalize && npm run data:validate && astro build
scripts.data:normalize: npm run data:normalize:movies && npm run data:normalize:books
scripts.data:validate: npm run data:validate:movies && npm run data:validate:books
